SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.automation

Class AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.automation.AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AgenticProcessOptimizer
public static final class AgenticProcessOptimizer.Trial extends Object implements Serializable
Record of one evaluated candidate point: the (state, action, reward) tuple consumed by ML and agentic post-processing.
See Also:

    Description
    private boolean
    feasible
    True when the run is feasible and all constraints are satisfied.

    Raw objective value (sense not applied).
    private double
    penalty
    Total constraint penalty added to the score.

    readbacks
    Read-back values (address → value).
    private final Map<String,String>
    rejected
    Per-address rejection reasons, if any.
    private boolean
    runFeasible
    True when the gated run converged and no setpoint was rejected.
    private double
    score
    Minimized scalar score.
    private static final long

    Serialization id.

    setpoints
